ระดับหลังคาน +3.75, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00

Bottom dimension chain (left to right, grid3 to grid1): 0.70 | 0.60 | 3.00 | 1.55 | 2.45, bracketed as 1.30 (left overhang) | 7.00 (grid3-grid2-grid1) | 1.30 (right overhang). Matches plan grid spans exactly.

warnings: This building cross-section (รูปตัด 1) cuts through the kitchen-prep (เตรียมอาหาร) and bathroom (ห้องน้ำ) area along grid row 3-2-1; roof framing itself is deferred to the structural drawings (S-01~S-08, outside this extraction's page range).

GRID-RELEVANT: this section's overhang breakdown beyond grid 3 (0.70 then 0.60, read right-to-left = same 1.30 total as รูปด้าน1/3) again confirms the roof-overhang figure is 1.30, distinct from the floor plan's 1.50 wall/room extension — see หน้า06_floor_plan.json and หน้า07_elevation1.json warnings for the full explanation of why these differ.
Sibling section รูปตัด 2 is in _หน้า09_section2.json.
Interior ceiling/fixture sub-dimensions (2.70/2.80) are small print, read with medium confidence only.
Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t2's หน้า09_section1.json — same content and level datums, no disagreement.
